MovieEntry.title: Movie Entry
MovieEntry.description: A record of a movie's title card appearance

titleCardTime.description: Timestamp when the title card appears (e.g., 00:15:30)

image.description: Base64 encoded image or URL of the title card

authorId.description: UID of the user who posted

authorName.description: Name of the user who posted

/movies/{movieId}.description: Collection of movie title card entries
